text: Ḥā, Meem.
tl: Haa-Meeem

text: The revelation of the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,
tl: Tanzeelul Kitaabi minal laahil Azeezil 'Aleem

text: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination.
tl: Ghaafiriz zambi Wa-qaabilit tawbi shadeedil 'iqaabi zit tawli laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa ilaihil maseer

text: No one disputes concerning the signs of Allāh except those who disbelieve, so be not deceived by their [uninhibited] movement throughout the land.
tl: Maa yujaadilu feee Aayaatil laahi illal lazeena kafaroo falaa yaghrurka taqallubuhum fil bilaad

text: The people of Noah denied before them and the [disbelieving] factions after them, and every nation intended [a plot] for their messenger to seize him, and they disputed by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth. So I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty.
tl: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohinw wal-Ahzaabu min ba'dihim Wa-hammat kullu ummatin bi-Rasoolihim li-ya'khuzoohu Wa-jaadaloo bilbaatili li-yud-hidoo bihil haqqa fa-akhaztuhum fa-kaifa kaana 'iqaab

text: And thus has the word [i.e., decree] of your Lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the Fire.
tl: Wa-kazaalika haqqat Kalimatu Rabbika 'alal lazeena kafarooo annahum Ashaabun Naar

text: Those [angels] who carry the Throne and those around it exalt [Allāh] with praise of their Lord and believe in Him and ask forgiveness for those who have believed, [saying], \"Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who have repented and followed Your way and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire.
tl: Allazeena yahmiloonal 'Arsha Wa-man hawlahoo yusabbihoona bihamdi Rabbihim Wa-yu'minoona bihee Wa-yastaghfiroona lillazeena aamanoo Rabbanaa wasi'ta kulla shai'ir rahmatanw Wa-'ilman faghfir lillazeena taaboo wattaba'oo sabeelaka Wa-qihim 'azaabal Jaheem

text: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their forefathers, their spouses and their offspring. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Rabbannaa Wa-adkhilhum Jannaati 'adninil latee wa'attahum Wa-man salaha min aabaaa'ihim Wa-azwaajihim Wa-zurriyyaatihim; innaka Antal 'Azeezul Hakeem

text: And protect them from the evil consequences [of their deeds]. And he whom You protect from evil consequences that Day - You will have given him mercy. And that is the great attainment.\"
tl: Wa-qihimus saiyi-aat; Wa-man taqis saiyi-aati Yawma'izin faqad rahimtah; Wa-zaalika huwal fawzul 'azeem

text: Indeed, those who disbelieve will be addressed, \"The hatred of Allāh for you was [even] greater than your hatred of yourselves [this Day in Hell] when you were invited to faith, but you disbelieved [i.e., refused].\"
tl: Innal lazeena kafaroo yunaadawna lamaqtul laahi akbaru mim maqtikum anfusakum iz tud'awna ilal eemaani fatakfuroon

text: They will say, \"Our Lord, You made us lifeless twice and gave us life twice, and we have confessed our sins. So is there to an exit any way?\"
tl: Qaaloo Rabbanaaa amat tanasnataini Wa-ahyaitanas nataini fa'tarafnaa bizunoo-binaa fahal ilaa khuroojim min sabeel

text: [They will be told], \"That is because, when Allāh was called upon alone, you disbelieved; but if others were associated with Him, you believed. So the judgement is with Allāh, the Most High, the Grand.\"
tl: Zaalikum bi-annahooo izaa du'iyal laahu wahdahoo kafartum Wa-ien yushrak bihee tu'minoo; falhukmu lillaahil 'Aliyyil Kabeer

text: It is He who shows you His signs and sends down to you from the sky, provision. But none will remember except he who turns back [in repentance].
tl: Huwal lazee yureekum Aayaatihee Wa-yunazzilu lakum minas samaaa'i rizqaa; Wa-maa tatazakkaru illaa maien yuneeb

text: So invoke Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, although the disbelievers dislike it.
tl: Fad'ul laaha mukhliseena lahud deena Wa-law karihal kaafiroon

text: [He is] the Exalted above [all] degrees, Owner of the Throne; He places the inspiration of His command [i.e., revelation] upon whom He wills of His servants to warn of the Day of Meeting.
tl: Rafee'ud darajaati zul 'Arshi yulqir rooha min amrihee 'alaa mai yashaaa'u min 'ibaadihee liyunzira yawmat talaaq

text: The Day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from Allāh. To whom belongs [all] sovereignty this Day? To Allāh, the One, the Prevailing.
tl: Yawma hum baarizoona laa yakhfaa 'alal laahi minhum shai; limanil mulkul Yawma lillaahil Waahidil Qahaar

text: This Day every soul will be recompensed for what it earned. No injustice today! Indeed, Allāh is swift in account.
tl: Al-Yawma tujzaa kullu nafsim bimaa kasabat; laa zulmal Yawm; innal laaha saree'ul hisaab

text: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Approaching Day, when hearts are at the throats, filled [with distress]. For the wrongdoers there will be no devoted friend and no intercessor [who is] obeyed.
tl: Wa-anzirhum yawmal aazifati izil quloobu ladal hanaajiri kaazimeen; maa lizzaalimeena min hameeminw Wa-laa shafee'ien yutaa'

text: He knows that which deceives the eyes and what the breasts conceal.
tl: Ya'lamu khaaa'inatal a'yuni Wa-maa tukhfis sudoor

text: And Allāh judges with truth, while those they invoke besides Him judge not with anything. Indeed, Allāh - He is the Hearing, the Seeing.
tl: Wallaahu yaqdee bilhaqq, wallazeena yad'oona min doonihee laa yaqdoona bishai'; innal laaha Huwas Samee'ul Baseer

text: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those who were before them? They were greater than them in strength and in impression on the land, but Allāh seized them for their sins. And they had not from Allāh any protector.
tl: Awalam yaseeroo fil ardi fa-yanzuroo kaifa kaana 'aaqibatul lazeena kaanoo min qablihim; kaanoo hum ashadda minhum quwwatanw Wa-aasaaran fil ardi fa-akhazahumul laahu bizunoobihim Wa-maa kaana lahum minal laahi minw waaq

text: That was because their messengers were coming to them with clear proofs, but they disbelieved, so Allāh seized them. Indeed, He is Powerful and severe in punishment.
tl: Zaalika bi-annahum kaanat taateehim Rusuluhum bilbaiyinaati fakafaroo fa-akhazahumul laah; innahoo qawiyyun shadeedul 'iqaab

text: And We did certainly send Moses with Our signs and a clear authority
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Moosaa bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-sultaanim mubeen

text: To Pharaoh, Hāmān and Qārūn, but they said, \"[He is] a magician and a liar.\"
tl: Ilaa Fir'awna Wa-Haamaana Wa-Qaaroona faqaaloo saahirun kazzaab

text: And when he brought them the truth from Us, they said, \"Kill the sons of those who have believed with him and keep their women alive.\" But the plan of the disbelievers is not except in error.
tl: Falama jaaa'ahum bil-haqqi min 'indinaa qaaluq tulooo abnaaa'al lazeena aamanoo ma'ahoo wastahyoo nisaaa'ahum; Wa-maa kaidul kaafireena illaa fee dalaal

text: And Pharaoh said, \"Let me kill Moses and let him call upon his Lord. Indeed, I fear that he will change your religion or that he will cause corruption in the land.\"
tl: Wa-qaala Fir'awnu zarooneee aqtul Moosaa walyad'u Rabbahoo inneee akhaafu ai yubaddila deenakum aw aien yuzhira fil ardil fasaad

text: But Moses said, \"Indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord from every arrogant one who does not believe in the Day of Account.\"
tl: Wa-qaala Moosaaaa innee 'uztu bi-Rabbee Wa-Rabbikum min kulli mutakabbiril laayu'minu bi Yawmil Hisaab

text: And a believing man from the family of Pharaoh who concealed his faith said, \"Do you kill a man [merely] because he says, 'My Lord is Allāh' while he has brought you clear proofs from your Lord? And if he should be lying, then upon him is [the consequence of] his lie; but if he should be truthful, there will strike you some of what he promises you. Indeed, Allāh does not guide one who is a transgressor and a liar.
tl: Wa-qaala rajulum mu'minummin Aali Fir'awna yaktumu eemaanahooo ataqtuloona rajulan aien yaqoola Rabbi-yal laahu Wa-qad jaaa'akum bil baiyinaati mir Rabbikum Wa-iny yaku kaaziban fa'alaihi kazibuh Wa-ien yaku saadiqaien yasibkum ba'dul lazee ya'idukum innal laaha laa yahdee man huwa musrifun kazzaab

text: O my people, sovereignty is yours today, [your being] dominant in the land. But who would protect us from the punishment of Allāh if it came to us?\" Pharaoh said, \"I do not show you except what I see, and I do not guide you except to the way of right conduct.\"
tl: Yaa-qawmi lakumul mulkul yawma zaahireena fil ardi famaien yansurunaa mim baasil laahi in jaaa'anaa; qaala Fir'awnu maaa ureekum illaa maaa araa Wa-maaa ahdeekum illaa sabeelar Rashaad

text: And he who believed said, \"O my people, indeed I fear for you [a fate] like the day of the companies -
tl: Wa-qaalal lazee aamana yaa-qawmi inneee akhaafu 'alaikum misla yawmil Ahzaab

text: Like the custom of the people of Noah and of ʿAad and Thamūd and those after them. And Allāh wants no injustice for [His] servants.
tl: Misla daabi qawmi Noohinw Wa-'aadinw Wa-Samooda wallazeena mim ba'dihim; Wa-mal laahu yureedu zulmal lil'ibaad

text: And O my people, indeed I fear for you the Day of Calling -
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi inneee akhaafu 'alaikum yawmat tanaad

text: The Day you will turn your backs fleeing; there is not for you from Allāh any protector. And whoever Allāh sends astray - there is not for him any guide.
tl: Yawma tuwalloona mud-bireena maa lakum minal laahi min 'aasim; Wa-maien yudlilil laahu famaa lahoo min haad

text: And Joseph had already come to you before with clear proofs, but you remained in doubt of that which he brought to you, until when he died, you said, 'Never will Allāh send a messenger after him.' Thus does Allāh leave astray he who is a transgressor and skeptic.\"
tl: Wa-laqad jaaa'akum Yoosufu min qablu bil-baiyyinaati famaa ziltum fee shakkim mimaa jaaa'akum bihee hattaaa izaa halaka qultum laien yab-asal laahu mim ba'dihee Rasoolaa; kazaalika yudillul laahu man huwa Musrifum murtaab

text: Those who dispute concerning the signs of Allāh without an authority having come to them - great is hatred [of them] in the sight of Allāh and in the sight of those who have believed. Thus does Allāh seal over every heart [belonging to] an arrogant tyrant.
tl: Allazeena yujaadiloona feee Aaayaatil laahi bighairi sultaanin ataahum kabura maqtan 'indal laahi Wa-'indal lazeena aamanoo; kazaalika yatbahul laahu 'alaa kulli qalbi mutakabbirin jabbaar

text: And Pharaoh said, \"O Hāmān, construct for me a tower that I might reach the ways -
tl: Wa-qaala Fir'awnu yaa Haamaanub-ni lee sarhal la'alleee ablughul asbaab

text: The ways into the heavens - so that I may look at the deity of Moses; but indeed, I think he is a liar.\" And thus was made attractive to Pharaoh the evil of his deed, and he was averted from the [right] way. And the plan of Pharaoh was not except in ruin.
tl: Asbaabas samaawaati faattali'a ilaaa ilaahi Moosaa Wa-innee la-azunnuhoo kaazibaa; Wa-kazaalika zuyyina li-Fir'awna sooo'u 'amalihee Wa-sudda 'anis sabeel; Wa-maa kaidu Fir'awna illaa fee tabaab

text: And he who believed said, \"O my people, follow me; I will guide you to the way of right conduct.
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeee aamana yaa-qawmit tabi'ooni ahdikum sabeelar rashaad

text: O my people, this worldly life is only [temporary] enjoyment, and indeed, the Hereafter - that is the home of [permanent] settlement.
tl: Yaa-qawmi innamaa haazihil hayaatud dunyaa mataa'unw Wa-innal Aakhirata hiya daarul qaraar

text: Whoever does an evil deed will not be recompensed except by the like thereof; but whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while he is a believer - those will enter Paradise, being given provision therein without account.
tl: Man 'amila saiyi'atan falaa yujzaaa illaa mislahaa Wa-man 'amila saaliham min zakarin aw unsaa Wa-huwa mu'minun fa-ulaaa'ika yadkhuloonal Jannata yurzaqoona feehaa bighairi hisaab

text: And O my people, how is it that I invite you to salvation while you invite me to the Fire?
tl: Wa-yaa-qawmi maa leee ad'ookum ilan najaati Wa-tad'oonaneee ilan Naar

text: You invite me to disbelieve in Allāh and associate with Him that of which I have no knowledge, and I invite you to the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.
tl: Tad'oonanee li-akfura billaahi Wa-ushrika bihee maa laisa lee bihee 'ilmunw Wa-ana ad'ookum ilal 'Azeezil Ghaffaar

text: Assuredly, that to which you invite me has no [response to a] supplication in this world or in the Hereafter; and indeed, our return is to Allāh, and indeed, the transgressors will be companions of the Fire.
tl: Laa jarama annamaa tad'oonanee ilaihi laisa lahoo da'watun fid dunyaa Wa-laa fil Aakhirati Wa-anna maraddanaaa ilal laahi Wa-annal musrifeena hum Ashaabun Naar

text: And you will remember what I [now] say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Seeing of [His] servants.\"
tl: Fasatazkuroona maaa aqoolu lakum; Wa-ufawwidu amreee ilal laah; innal laaha baseerum bil'ibaad

text: So Allāh protected him from the evils they plotted, and the people of Pharaoh were enveloped by the worst of punishment -
tl: Fa-waqaahul laahu saiyyiaati maa makaroo Wa-haaqa bi Aali-Fir'awna sooo'ul 'azaab

text: The Fire; they are exposed to it morning and evening. And the Day the Hour appears [it will be said], \"Make the people of Pharaoh enter the severest punishment.\"
tl: An-Naaru yu'radoona 'alaihaa ghuduwwanw Wa-'ashiyyanw Wa-Yawma taqoomus Saa'aatu adkhilooo Aala Fir'awna ashaddal 'azaab

text: And [mention] when they will argue within the Fire, and the weak will say to those who had been arrogant, \"Indeed, we were [only] your followers, so will you relieve us of a share of the Fire?\"
tl: Wa-iz yatahaaajjoona fin Naari fa-yaqoolud du'afaaa'u lillazeenas takbarooo innaa kunnaa lakum taba'an fahal antum mughnoona annaa naseebam minan Naar

text: Those who had been arrogant will say, \"Indeed, all [of us] are in it. Indeed, Allāh has judged between the servants.\"
tl: Qaalal lazeenas takbarooo innaa kullun feehaaa innal laaha qad hakama baynal 'ibaad

text: And those in the Fire will say to the keepers of Hell, \"Supplicate your Lord to lighten for us a day from the punishment.\"
tl: Wa-qaalal lazeena fin Naari likhazanati Jahannamad 'oo Rabbakum yukhaffif 'annaa yawmam minal 'azaab

text: They will say, \"Did there not come to you your messengers with clear proofs?\" They will say, \"Yes.\" They will reply, \"Then supplicate [yourselves], but the supplication of the disbelievers is not except in error [i.e., futility].\"
tl: Qaalooo awalam taku taateekum Rusulukum bilbaiyinaati qaaloo balaa' qaaloo fad'oo; Wa-maa du'aaa'ul kaafireena illaa fee dalaal

text: Indeed, We will support Our messengers and those who believe during the life of this world and on the Day when the witnesses will stand -
tl: Innaa lanansuru Rusulanaa wallazeena aamanoo fil hayaatid dunyaa Wa-Yawma yaqoomul ashhaad

text: The Day their excuse will not benefit the wrongdoers, and they will have the curse, and they will have the worst home [i.e., Hell].
tl: Yawma laa yanfa'uz zaalimeena ma'ziratuhum Wa-lahumul la'natu Wa-lahum soooud daar

text: And We had certainly given Moses guidance, and We caused the Children of Israel to inherit the Scripture
tl: Wa-laqad aatainaa Moosal hudaa Wa-awrasnaa Baneee Israaa-'eelal Kitaab

text: As guidance and a reminder for those of understanding.
tl: Hudanw Wa-zikraa li-ulil albaab

text: So be patient, [O Muḥammad]. Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And ask forgiveness for your sin and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord in the evening and the morning.
tl: Fasbir inna wa'dal laahi haqqunw wastaghfir lizambika Wa-sabbih bihamdi Rabbika bil'ashiyyi wal-ibkaar

text: Indeed, those who dispute concerning the signs of Allāh without [any] evidence having come to them - there is not within their breasts except pride, [the extent of] which they cannot reach. So seek refuge in Allāh. Indeed, it is He who is the Hearing, the Seeing.
tl: Innal lazeena yujaadi-loona feee Aayaatil laahi bighairi sultaanin ataahum in fee sudoorihim illaa kibrum maa hum bibaaligheeh; fasta'iz billaahi innahoo Huwas Samee'ul Baseer

text: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind, but most of the people do not know.
tl: Lakhalqus samaawaati wal-ardi akbaru min khalqin naasi Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa ya'lamoon

text: And not equal are the blind and the seeing, nor are those who believe and do righteous deeds and the evildoer. Little do you remember.
tl: Wa-maa yastawil a'maa walbaseeru wallazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati Wa-lal museee'; qaleelam maa tatazakkaroon

text: Indeed, the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - but most of the people do not believe.
tl: Innas Saa'ata la-aatiyatul laa raiba feehaa Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa yu'minoon

text: And your Lord says, \"Call upon Me; I will respond to you.\" Indeed, those who disdain My worship will enter Hell [rendered] contemptible.
tl: Wa-qaala Rabbukumud 'ooneee astajib lakum; innal lazeena yastakbiroona an 'ibaadatee sa-yadkhuloona jahannama daakhireen

text: It is Allāh who made for you the night that you may rest therein and the day giving sight. Indeed, Allāh is the possessor of bounty for the people, but most of them are not grateful.
tl: Allaahul lazee ja'ala lakumul laila littaskunoo feehi wannahaara mubsiraa; innal laaha lazoo fadlin 'alan naasi Wa-laakinna aksaran naasi laa yashkuroon

text: That is Allāh, your Lord, Creator of all things; there is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded?
tl: Zaalikumul laahu Rabbukum khaaliqu kulli shai'in; laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fa-annaa tu'fakoon

text: Thus were those [before you] deluded who were rejecting the signs of Allāh.
tl: Kazaalika yu'fakul lazeena kaanoo bi-Aayaatil laahi yajhadoon

text: It is Allāh who made for you the earth a place of settlement and the sky a structure [i.e., ceiling] and formed you and perfected your forms and provided you with good things. That is Allāh, your Lord; then blessed is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.
tl: Allaahul lazee ja'ala lakumul arda qaraaranw wassa-maaa'a binaaa'anw Wa-sawwarakum fa-ahsana suwarakum Wa-razaqakum minat taiyibaat; zaalikumul laahu Rabbukum fatabaarakal laahu Rabbul 'aalameen

text: He is the Ever-Living; there is no deity except Him, so call upon Him, [being] sincere to Him in religion. [All] praise is [due] to Allāh, Lord of the worlds.
tl: Huwal Hayyu laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fad'oohu mukh liseena lahudeen; alhamdu lillaahi Rabbil 'aalameen

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Indeed, I have been forbidden to worship those you call upon besides Allāh once the clear proofs have come to me from my Lord, and I have been commanded to submit to the Lord of the worlds.\"
tl: Qul innee nuheetu an a'budal lazeena tad'oona min doonil laahi lammaa jaaa'a-niyal baiyinaatu mir Rabbee Wa-umirtu an uslima li-Rabbil 'aalameen

text: It is He who created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot; then He brings you out as a child; then [He develops you] that you reach your [time of] maturity, then [further] that you become elders. And among you is he who is taken in death before [that], so that you reach a specified term; and perhaps you will use reason.
tl: Huwal lazee khalaqakum min turaabin summa min nutfatin summa min 'alaqatin summa yukhrijukum tiflan summa litablughooo ashuddakum summa litakoonoo shuyookhaa; Wa-minkum maien yutawaffaa min qablu Wa-litablughooo ajalam musam-manw wa-la'allakum ta'qiloon

text: He it is who gives life and causes death; and when He decrees a matter, He but says to it, \"Be,\" and it is.
tl: Huwal lazee yuhyee Wa-yumeetu fa-izaa qadaaa amran fa-innamaa yaqoolu lahoo kun fa-yakoon

text: Do you not consider those who dispute concerning the signs of Allāh - how are they averted?
tl: Alam tara ilal lazeena yujaadiloona feee Aayaatil laahi annaa yusrafoon

text: Those who deny the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] and that with which We sent Our messengers - they are going to know,
tl: Allazeena kazzaboo bil-Kitaabi Wa-bimaa arsalnaa bihee Rusulanaa fasawfa ya'lamoon

text: When the shackles are around their necks and the chains; they will be dragged
tl: Izil aghlaalu feee a'naaqi-him wassalaasilu yushaboon

text: In boiling water; then in the Fire they will be filled [with flame].
tl: Fil hameemi summa fin Naari Yasjaroon

text: Then it will be said to them, \"Where is that which you used to associate [with Him in worship]
tl: Summaa qeela lahum ayna maa kuntum tushrikoon

text: Other than Allāh?\" They will say, \"They have departed from us; rather, we did not used to invoke previously anything.\" Thus does Allāh put astray the disbelievers.
tl: Min doonil laahi qaaloo dalloo 'annaa bal lam nakun nad'oo min qablu shai'aa; kazaalika yudillul laahul kaafireen

text: [The angels will say], \"That was because you used to exult upon the earth without right and you used to behave insolently.
tl: Zaalikum bimaa kuntum tafrahoona fil ardi bighairil haqqi Wa-bimaa kuntum tamrahoon

text: Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant.\"
tl: Udkhulooo abwaaba Jahannama khaalideena feehaa fabi'sa maswal mutakabbireen

text: So be patient, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned.
tl: Fasbir inna wa'dal laahi haqq; fa-immaa nuriyannak ba'dal lazee na'i-duhum aw natawaffayannaka fa-ilainaa yurja'oon

text: And We have already sent messengers before you. Among them are those [whose stories] We have related to you, and among them are those [whose stories] We have not related to you. And it was not for any messenger to bring a sign [or verse] except by permission of Allāh. So when the command of Allāh comes, it will be concluded [i.e., judged] in truth, and the falsifiers will thereupon lose [all].
tl: Wa-laqad arsalnaa Rusulam min qablika minhum man qasasnaa 'alaika Wa-minhum mal lam naqsus 'alaik; Wa-maa kaana li-Rasoolin any yaatiya bi-Aayatin illaa bi-iznil laah; fa-izaa jaaa'a amrul laahi qudiya bilhaqqi Wa-khasira hunaalikal mubtiloon

text: It is Allāh who made for you the grazing animals upon which you ride, and some of them you eat.
tl: Allaahul lazee ja'ala lakumul an'aama litarkaboo minhaa Wa-minhaa taakuloon

text: And for you therein are [other] benefits and that you may realize upon them a need which is in your breasts; and upon them and upon ships you are carried.
tl: Wa-lakum feehaa manaafi'u Wa-litablughoo 'alaihaa haajatan fee sudoorikum Wa-'alaihaa Wa-'alal fulki tuhmaloon

text: And He shows you His signs. So which of the signs of Allāh do you deny?
tl: Wa-yureekum Aayaatihee fa-ayya Aayaatil laahi tunkiroon

text: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? They were more numerous than themselves and greater in strength and in impression on the land, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.
tl: Afalam yaseeroo fil ardi fa-yanzuroo kaifa kaana 'aaqibatul lazeena min qablihim; kaanoo aksara minhum Wa-ashadda quwwatanw Wa-aasaaran fil ardi famaaa aghnaa 'anhum maa kaanoo yaksiboon

text: And when their messengers came to them with clear proofs, they [merely] rejoiced in what they had of knowledge, but they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Falammaa jaaa'at-hum Rusuluhum bilbaiyinaati farihoo bimaa 'indahum minal 'ilmi Wa-haaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And when they saw Our punishment, they said, \"We believe in Allāh alone and disbelieve in that which we used to associate with Him.\"
tl: Falammaa ra-aw baasanaa qaalooo aamannaa billaahi wahdahoo Wa-kafarnaa bimaa kunnaa bihee mushrikeen

text: But never did their faith benefit them once they saw Our punishment. [It is] the established way of Allāh which has preceded among His servants. And the disbelievers thereupon lost [all].
tl: Falam yaku tanfa-'uhum eemaanuhum lammaa ra-aw ba'sana sunnatal laahil latee qad khalat fee 'ibaadihee Wa-khasira hunaalikal kaafiroon
